title: Beef Dumplings with Marsala Sauce
description: A hearty dish of beef dumplings served in a rich Marsala sauce, perfect for a cold winter night. This recipe combines the flavors of beef and Marsala wine with the comfort of homemade dumplings.
instructions: In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the Marsala wine to the pan and stir to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the liquid has reduced by half.
Add the chopped mushrooms to the pan and stir to combine. Cook until the mushrooms are tender.
In a separate bowl, combine the Russian dumpling mix and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the dumpling mix to the pan and stir to combine. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the dumplings are cooked through.
Transfer the dumplings to a baking dish and dot the top with butter.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, until they are golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot, topped with additional Marsala sauce if desired.
